title: Liquid Glass iOS 26 Polish Specification
summary: Completed an iOS 26 Liquid Glass polish pass with shared design-system helpers, native tab-bar minimization, updated auth/chat actions, deterministic light/dark visual smoke capture, and production simulator verification.
next_action: Future pass: add higher-fidelity chat assistant backend responses and richer interactive transcript tests when backend support exists.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Completed implementation, visual audit fixes, production simulator verification, and final simulator launch.
resume_context.notes: Visual smoke now resets local app state for deterministic screenshots. Liquid Glass is intentionally limited to high-value controls and overlays; dense content remains standard SwiftUI content.
